title: An Act to Protect the Health of Medical Cannabis Patients and Streamline the Mandatory Testing of Cannabis
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, May 21, 2025
last_house_action: 3/21/2025 - Carried over, in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.
last_senate_action: 5/21/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

actions.description: Committee on Veterans and Legal Affairs suggested and ordered printed. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on VETERANS AND LEGAL AFFAIRS . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on VETERANS AND LEGAL AFFAIRS in concurrence
Carried over, in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.
Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
